title: Distill a Mind into a Skill
description: Distill how one thinker reasons — their mental models, decision heuristics, and expression DNA — into a runnable persona skill. A faithful lift of the '女娲 · Skill造人术' (huashu-nuwa) skill from alchaincyf/nuwa-skill (MIT): the source's pipeline becomes the DAG. One intake frames the persona brief; six research lanes then fan out IN PARALLEL — the skill's Phase 1 Agent swarm across the six fixed dimensions (writings, conversations, expression-DNA, external views, decisions, timeline) that each write 01-06; a verification node cross-checks them (the skill's Phase 1.5 review + the extraction-framework's triple test: cross-domain recurrence, generativity, exclusivity); a synthesis node integrates the survivors into the persona's models, heuristics, voice, values, tensions, and honest boundary (Phase 2); two validation lanes then split the skill's Phase 4 — a sanity check on KNOWN public positions versus an edge-case check on NEWLY-DERIVED inferences (which must hedge); and a final build assembles the runnable persona SKILL.md from the skill-template (Phase 3). The knowledge is in the arrows: a single 'be more like X' prompt collapses these stages — this trace pulls them back apart. ⚠️ Illustrative: the demo run distills a FICTIONAL figure ('Mira Tan') from invented source material — not a real person and not a real persona.

intake.name: Persona Intake
intake.does: Frame the brief: who is being distilled, the focus dimension, the intended use, and whether local corpus is provided.

research_1.name: Research — Writings
research_1.does: Mine books, long-form essays, and papers for the core claims repeated ≥3 times (true beliefs), coined terms, and reading lists.

research_2.name: Research — Conversations
research_2.does: Mine long interviews, podcasts, and AMAs for how the subject answers when pushed, improvised analogies, and position shifts.

research_3.name: Research — Expression DNA
research_3.does: Mine short-form posts and talks for sentence fingerprint, signature vocabulary, taboo words, humor, and certainty register.

research_4.name: Research — External Views
research_4.does: Mine others' analyses, reviews, and critiques for externally observed patterns, the real criticisms, and peer contrast.

research_5.name: Research — Decisions
research_5.does: Mine major decisions and turning points for the actual logic, hindsight reflection, and say/do (in)consistency.

research_6.name: Research — Timeline
research_6.does: Build the timeline from start to now: milestones, inflection points, and the most recent twelve months (anti-staleness).

triple_verify.name: Triple-Verify Research
triple_verify.does: Cross-check the six lanes; run each candidate claim through the triple test (cross-domain recurrence, generativity, exclusivity); keep contradictions.

synthesize.name: Synthesize the Framework
synthesize.does: Integrate the survivors into mental models, decision heuristics, expression DNA, values & anti-patterns, inner tensions, lineage, and the honest boundary.

known_traits.name: Sanity Check — Known Positions
known_traits.does: Replay the framework against positions the subject has stated publicly; direction-match each. Established, on-record traits.

novel_inferences.name: Edge Case — Novel Inferences
novel_inferences.does: Apply the framework to questions the subject never addressed; derive a hedged inference per model. Newly-derived, must not be stated as fact.

persona_skill.name: Build the Persona Skill
persona_skill.does: Assemble the runnable persona SKILL.md from the template: role rules, models, heuristics, voice, timeline, values, lineage, and honest boundary.

deliverable.description: A runnable persona skill (SKILL.md) that reasons in the subject's voice — mental models, decision heuristics, and expression DNA — backed by the distilled framework, the triple-verification report that decided which claims survived, and the two-sided validation (known on-record positions vs hedged novel inferences). Illustrative: the demo distills a FICTIONAL figure from invented source material.
